mutations.trigger_condition: Coarse QTZ 3bit Residue: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
Swaps REF/FB effects, so REF clears and FB sets the latch.
Drives zero output and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Drives DOWN equal to UP instead of the complementary latch state.
RS Phase Detector: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
Ignores FB rising edges, so UP stays asserted after REF.
Adds 200 mV instead of the required 350 mV offset.
Adds an erroneous gain of 2 before the offset.
Subtracts the level shift instead of adding it.
Level Shifter Offset: scales the metric output, preserving the main path while failing measurement checks.
Keeps the output at its trivial zero behavior and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
Uses the old MSB-normalized scale instead of the all-ones full-scale code.
Uses a threshold above the input high level.
Keeps the output at its trivial zero behavior and therefore fails the stable waveform contract.
